description_long: This sculpture depicts the Hindu deity Shiva Nataraja, shown dancing within a circular ring of flames. The figure stands on one leg atop a small demon, with the other leg raised and arms extended in dynamic poses. The circular frame is adorned with stylized flame motifs, and the deity's hair fans out in an elaborate headdress. The sculpture is rendered in a dark metallic material, with intricate details on the jewelry, facial features, and body posture. The base is round and solid, providing stability for the upright figure and the encircling ring. The overall appearance is both majestic and energetic, capturing a sense of movement and spiritual symbolism.
description: A detailed metallic sculpture of Shiva Nataraja dancing within a ring of flames, standing on a round base with intricate features and dynamic posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing Shiva Nataraja's face, raised leg, extended arms, and the full circular ring of flames.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sculpture, the profile of the deity, and the thickness of the ring and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, the headdress, and the reverse side of the flame ring.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, the curvature of the limbs, and the structure of the base.
attribute_subject_matter: Shiva Nataraja, Hindu deity in a dancing pose within a ring of flames
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
